event: Fair Booths on Admiralty Square, St. Petersburg
description: A wide panoramic painting depicting a bustling winter fair in a Russian city square. Wooden market booths with decorated facades line the left side, festooned with signs and goods. A massive, dense crowd fills the entire foreground and middle ground — hundreds of figures bundled in winter clothing, fur hats, and heavy coats press together. Horse-drawn carriages and sleds are visible among the crowd. The atmosphere is hazy with cold air and smoke from vendors' stalls. In the background, more booths, structures, and the outline of city buildings are visible through the winter haze.

_meta.title: Fair Booths on Admiralty Square, St. Petersburg
